description: Connection attempt from known suspicious external IP
recommended_response: Block IP at firewall, search logs for related connections, review affected destination host.

description: User added to local administrators group
recommended_response: Remove unauthorized privileges, review account activity, isolate affected host if needed.

description: Malware-like behavior detected by endpoint protection
recommended_response: Isolate endpoint, collect evidence, run malware scan, begin incident response process.
Force password reset, revoke sessions, review MFA and identity logs.
Collect PowerShell and Sysmon logs, review command line, isolate host if malicious intent is suspected.
Validate service name, binary path, and creator. Disable service if unauthorized.

description: Critical CVE detected on database server
recommended_response: Patch affected asset or apply compensating controls. Prioritize based on exposure and asset criticality.

description: Multiple failed SSH login attempts detected
recommended_response: Block source IP if repeated, review authentication logs, confirm no successful login followed.
Review modified file, validate change approval, restore from backup if unauthorized.

description: Port scanning activity detected against endpoint
recommended_response: Validate whether scan was authorized. Review source host and firewall logs.
